item.title: Now
item.description:
What I am currently working on

  • Finalizing my paper on focused crawling and setting up a pipeline to further investigate future work.
  • Drafting my synopsis for the dissertation
  • Handover process of my work as head of HR at uniKITA Darmstadt e.V.

item.title: Why?
item.description:
This story begins with me wanting to write for my own (and others) a long time ago. One may ask

“Why? Writing comes natural, if you sought-after?” but for me, it never worked.

To this question I can only give you the following answer. I always got caught in some kind of perfectionism, i.e., I never found the right tool for me, which prevented me from starting all along. Once I tried hugo, but I was not happy with it. Then I tried to build my own static-site-generator but stopped half-way through and deleted, what I had. Most of the time I wanted to share all the nerdy tech tools I tinkered with, but without a platform to share, it never had been.

item.title: About Me - Philipp Kühn
item.description: Hi, I’m Philipp, father of four lovely children, research assistant at PEASEC working on making the world more secure. My current research focus is how to get mitigate information overload in CERTs and SOCs and prepare the used information. Hereby I use methods of natural language processing, information retrieval, and data mining, tailored to common tasks in information security. To give you an example, my colleague Markus Bayer and me trained a large language model for the ITSec domain called CySecBERT1.
